---
title: "Gallery"
subtitle: "A creative outlet complementing my academic activities."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
lightbox: 
  match: auto
  effect: zoom
---

::: {.project-section}
## Pixel Art
*To make these, I use [Aseprite](https://www.aseprite.org/) which used to be FOSS till 2016, but is currently a paid (but source-available) software. It can be built locally from the source, by following [these](https://www.reddit.com/r/PixelArt/comments/on9pw6/guide_how_to_build_aseprite_from_source_aseprite/) instructions, but it is certainly worth purchasing as well.*

::: {.art-column-grid}

::: {.art-card}
![**Phi@I logo #1** And God said, let there be Phi.](/images/pixelart/phi1.png){group="pixel"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Phi@I logo #2** Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.](/images/pixelart/phi2.png){group="pixel"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Phi@I logo #3** The future is now, old man.](/images/pixelart/phi3.png){group="pixel"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Choices** The bad and the ugly of a competitive environment.](/images/pixelart/choices.png){group="pixel"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Trapped** A different perspective of the previous piece, *Choices*.](/images/pixelart/trapped.png){group="pixel"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Entwined** The struggles within. Inseparable. Ensnared. Entwined.](/images/pixelart/entwined.png){group="pixel"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Adventure** Inspired by Terraria. Exploring the unknown is strangely addictive.](/images/pixelart/adventure.png){group="pixel"}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.project-section}
## 3D Models
*Exploring the third dimension with [Blender](https://www.blender.org/).*

::: {.art-column-grid}

::: {.art-card}
![**Bow and Arrow**](/images/blender/arrow.png){group="3d"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Roulette**](/images/blender/roulette.png){group="3d"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Futuristic**](/images/blender/cyberpunk.png){group="3d"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Rocking Horse**](/images/blender/horse.png){group="3d"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Windmill**](/images/blender/windmill.png){group="3d"}
:::

::: {.art-card}
![**Grandfather Clock**](/images/blender/clock.png){group="3d"}
:::

:::
:::
